prompt: Process 5,000 images through a Modal function that resizes them to thumbnails and collect all results
assertions: The code uses .map() or .starmap() for synchronous fan-out and in-process result collection
The code does not use .spawn() since the caller needs results back immediately
The code includes a @app.function or @app.cls decorated resize function
The code demonstrates collecting all results (e.g., iterating the .map() generator or list(...))
The code sets or acknowledges max_containers or concurrency limits where relevant
The code uses a local_entrypoint or with app.run(): to orchestrate the 5,000 inputs
